hero.title: Welcome to Volt Wave Tech
hero.subtitle: Your destination for electronics and power solutions. We ensure quality products and services.

fast_delivery.title: Fast Delivery
fast_delivery.desc: Quick delivery across the country within 24-48 hours.

original_products.title: Original Products
original_products.desc: We guarantee 100% authentic and genuine electronics.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Our dedicated support team is always ready to help you.

trust.title: Certified Quality & Professional Excellence
trust.desc: At Volt Wave Tech, we don't just sell electronics; we deliver excellence. Our products and services are backed by industry certifications and a commitment to the highest standards of safety and performance.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your workspace?
cta.desc: Explore our wide range of professional tools and expert components designed for engineers and hobbyists alike.

brand.title: Our Brand Identity
brand.desc: Volt Wave Tech stands for quality and reliability in the electronics industry.

about_page.title: About Volt Wave Tech
about_page.subtitle: Leading the way in electronics and power solutions.
about_page.mission_desc: To provide high-quality electronic components and professional services that empower innovation and efficiency for our clients.
about_page.vision_desc: To be the most trusted partner in the electronics industry, known for reliability, expertise, and excellence.

values.title: Our Values
values.quality_desc: We never compromise on the authenticity and performance of our products.
values.integrity_desc: We build lasting relationships through honesty and transparency.
values.innovation_desc: We continuously evolve to bring you the latest technologies.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help.
